narrative:
Bethel Township has 3,443 registered voters, with 49.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.5 percentage points.
